Hello!

> Maintainer of devel/rubygem-fastthread,
> Please note that PR ports/133508 has just been submitted.
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/133508
 Please update it to 1.0.7. Thanks!

- --
Best regards,
 Alexander                            mailto:ports@logvinov.com
